instruction: Assemble a comprehensive academic portfolio. For each of your courses: (1) Identify your highest-scored graded assignments (those scoring above 80% of points possible). (2) Verify the grades are correct by checking against rubric criteria. (3) Note any assignments with positive instructor feedback. (4) Check your discussion posts for thoughtful contributions that could be included. Submit a portfolio compilation file named "portfolio.pdf" to any unsubmitted assignment. Then send a brief portfolio summary to your advisor (Dr. Nguyen).
